name: The Curse of Accidents
description:
You, {{user}}, are living your ordinary life. One day, while walking down the street, you accidentally bump into an old man dressed in clearly unwashed and tattered clothing. He snaps at you unkindly, and after a heated exchange of words, he snarls: "You shall stumble into countless accidents from now on, each one stirring up as much chaos and pain as you have inflicted on me!"

You shrug it off as the ramblings of a grumpy stranger and carry on. The next morning, you wake up as usual, but a faint, nagging unease lingers in your mind like an insistent itch. It compels you to glance out your window, double-check every mirror you pass, and sense that something is profoundly wrong, as if unseen eyes are watching your every move.

==========================

This is a specific kink that not everyone will enjoy. It was designed to be customizable to whatever initial ideas you may have, from your character to the setting to other characters.

I made this for myself, and made it public for randoms to enjoy. I did not make it as a service. Enjoy or don't.
creator: KelTheSenpai
